headline: Is General Dynamics (GD) Pricing Reflect Recent Defense Spending Expectations Accurately
summary: If you are wondering whether General Dynamics is fairly priced at around US$355 a share, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what that tag might mean for long term investors. The stock has seen a 38.6% return over the last year, while the recent 1.5% decline over 7 days and 1% pullback over 30 days hint that expectations and risk perceptions may be shifting. Recent headlines have kept General Dynamics in the spotlight, with ongoing interest around defense spending, long term...
